commands.author: mazhuima

target.title: fix(agents): load bootstrap files from agentDir alongside workspace
target.body:
## Problem
`src/agents/bootstrap-files.ts` loads bootstrap files from `workspaceDir` only and does not read explicitly configured `agentDir`. When users configure an `agentDir` for their agents, bootstrap files placed there are ignored.

Fixes #29387

## Fix
Modify `loadBootstrapFiles()` to also load explicitly configured `agentDir` bootstrap files, with `agentDir` files overriding same-named workspace files for correct precedence. Gate loading on explicit `agentDir` config to avoid unnecessary file I/O.

## Real Behavior Proof

### Before (broken)
- `loadBootstrapFiles()` only reads from `workspaceDir`
- Bootstrap files placed in configured `agentDir` are silently ignored
- Users who set `agentDir` in agent config get no bootstrap files loaded from that directory

### After (fixed)
- `loadBootstrapFiles()` reads from both `workspaceDir` and `agentDir`
- `agentDir` files take precedence over same-named workspace files
- `BOOTSTRAP.md` is filtered out from both directories
- No config change needed — existing `agentDir` configs immediately pick up bootstrap files

### Reproduction
1. Configure an agent with `agentDir: "/path/to/agent"`
2. Place a bootstrap file (e.g., `instructions.md`) in `/path/to/agent`
3. Before fix: bootstrap file is not loaded; after fix: file is loaded and used
4. Place same-named file in workspaceDir — agentDir version takes precedence

### Test Results (vitest 4.1.8)
```
$ vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/bootstrap-files.test.ts

 RUN  v4.1.8

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  37 passed (37)
   Duration  3.71s
```

All 37 bootstrap-files tests pass, covering workspace bootstrap loading, agentDir precedence, same-name override behavior, and BOOTSTRAP.md filtering.
